name: 出牌吧冒险家 Go Poker
short_description: A relaxed, casual RogueLike game Using poker cards as weapons, interacting with over 50 items and spells Simple and exhilarating rules, each game only takes 3 minutes, yet can captivate players for dozens of hours Playable cooperatively with 2 to 4 people, challenging big bosses together
detailed_description:
Game Features
Use playing cards as weapons—the larger the combination, the higher the damage.


Each of the four disciples has unique active skills. Use them at the right time to turn the tide of battle.


Furthermore, both the playing cards and active skills interact with items, bringing a unique Roguelike experience.


Supports 2 to 4 players cooperating to defeat bosses. In this mode, the playing cards can not only attack but also protect teammates.


Dragon Training is a cultivation gameplay mode, somewhat like a Roguelike + PvP game where you choose only five skills. It's simple and fast-paced.


Casual Game, Welcome to Try It Out
This game is very casual and not mentally taxing. Steam experts might initially find it straightforward and enjoyable but mindless. However, as the difficulty increases and bosses like Red Boy and Princess Iron Fan appear, you'll realize that item combinations are important, and you can't just play any card—your moves must be strategic. Later in the game, when teaming up to fight bosses, teamwork and strategy become crucial.

About Pricing
Mobile players often play for tens of hours. If you play both Dragon Training and team up to fight bosses, it can last for hundreds of hours. Nevertheless, this is a casual game, priced at 6 CNY, which is a great value. You can also play for free indefinitely, but with limited daily stamina. My hope is simple: to continue making games, creating innovative and sincere games.
